title: Shari Mattingly's Mother — Frost Family Maternal Ancestry Research
task: Identify Shari Mattingly's mother (born ~1923, San Antonio TX) and her Frost-family ancestry. Shari's mother's brother was reportedly president of Frost Bank (San Antonio, founded 1868).
methodology_note: Sources consulted: TSHA Handbook of Texas Online (primary), Find a Grave (direct + Brave snippet bypass for Cloudflare), Wayback Machine CDX API, WikiTree HTML search, FamilySearch (blocked), Texas Marriage Index (paywalled), Ancestry (paywalled/blocked), San Antonio Express-News via Wayback Machine archive, 'Eda and Ilse' (Apple Books abstract). Primary-source verification was the standard; AI-generated genealogy trees were not used.

shari_mother.maiden_name: UNKNOWN — most probable: Frost (see hypothesis_primary below)
shari_mother.birth_year: ~1923 (family oral tradition) — may be off by 2-4 years; ~1925-1927 is also plausible given parents' documented marriage timing

parents.hypothesis: PROBABLE — daughter of Thomas Clayborne Frost III (1903-1971) and Florence Ilse Herff Frost (1906-1984)
parents.confidence: LOW — no birth record, marriage record, or obituary found that names this person; hypothesis rests entirely on (a) Shari's reported 'uncle was president of Frost Bank,' (b) Tom Frost Jr. being the confirmed Frost Bank president 1963-1997, (c) Tom Frost Jr. being the son of T.C. Frost III and Ilse Herff

known.name: Tom Frost Jr. (Thomas Clayborne Frost IV)
known.role: President, Culberson-Frost Bankers / Frost Bank, 1963-1997; Chairman Emeritus thereafter
known.confidence: CONFIRMED for Tom Frost Jr. being a son of T.C. Frost III; UNCONFIRMED as Shari's maternal uncle

known.name: Ilse 'Ita' Herff Frost McNeel
known.confidence: CONFIRMED as daughter of T.C. Frost III and Ilse Herff

siblings.note: Only two children of T.C. Frost III are listed on Find a Grave. A daughter born ~1923-1927 who could be Shari's mother is NOT listed there and has not been found in any accessible record. The absence does not disprove her existence — Find a Grave is not a complete vital records source.

sources: Find a Grave memorial 192133735 (Tom Frost Jr.) — via Brave search snippet bypass
Find a Grave memorial 22626938 (Ilse Ita McNeel) — via Wayback Machine archive
TSHA Handbook of Texas: 'Frost, Thomas Claiborne' — https://www.tshaonline.org/handbook/entries/frost-thomas-claiborne
San Antonio Express-News obituary re Tom Frost Jr. (2018) — via Wayback Machine archive
shari_mother.confidence: LOW — name, birth record, and marriage record not found in any accessible source; identity is hypothesized from family oral tradition plus confirmed Frost Bank presidential succession

frost_grandmother.family_background: Herff family — prominent San Antonio German-Texan medical and civic family. Likely daughter of Ferdinand Ludwig Herff line (established SA medical dynasty).

marriage.marriage_year: UNKNOWN — must predate any ~1923 birth; ~1922-1924 is probable window
sources: Find a Grave memorial 22626925 (confirmed spousal link)
'Eda and Ilse' (Apple Books) — documents Kampmann-Herff-Frost family interconnections

frost_grandmother.confidence: CONFIRMED as T.C. Frost III's wife and Tom Frost Jr.'s mother; relationship to Shari Mattingly is UNCONFIRMED

frost_grandfather.full_name: Thomas Clayborne Frost III (known as 'T.C. Frost Sr.' in his son's era)
frost_grandfather.find_a_grave: UNKNOWN — not located in accessible search

parents.father: Joseph Hardin Frost (1881-1956), bank president 1926-1963 (some sources; see succession note)

frost_grandfather.confidence: CONFIRMED — birth and death dates from Texas Death Index / Bexar County records per Find a Grave metadata; bank role confirmed via 2018 obituary references

most_likely_candidate.name: Tom Frost Jr. (Thomas Clayborne Frost IV)
most_likely_candidate.bank_role: President, Culberson-Frost Bankers, 1963-1997; Chairman Emeritus until death
most_likely_candidate.why_likely: Only well-documented Frost Bank president in the 20th century; son of T.C. Frost III and Ilse Herff; widely covered in San Antonio Express-News and Texas business press
most_likely_candidate.relationship_to_shari: Would be maternal uncle IF Shari's mother was a daughter of T.C. Frost III and Ilse Herff
most_likely_candidate.confidence: PROBABLE — Frost Bank president identity confirmed; uncle relationship to Shari is the unconfirmed step

eliminated_candidates.name: Joseph Hardin Frost Jr.
eliminated_candidates.reason_eliminated: Find a Grave describes him as 'business investor,' NOT bank president; wrong branch of Frost family (son of Joseph H. Frost + Eda Kampmann, not T.C. Frost III line)

generation_1.name: Thomas Claiborne Frost I (founder)
generation_1.role: Founded Frost National Bank, San Antonio, 1868

generation_2.name: Thomas Claiborne Frost II (son of founder)
generation_2.role: Succeeded his father; bank president until circa 1926

generation_2b.name: Joseph Hardin Frost
generation_2b.role: Bank president 1926-1963 (parallel to or succeeding T.C. Frost II; sources vary on exact overlap)
generation_2b.note: TSHA lists him as T.C. Frost I's son; succeeded T.C. Frost II as president
generation_2b.source: TSHA Handbook of Texas; Find a Grave memorial 22626951

generation_3.name: Thomas Clayborne Frost III
generation_3.role: Bank president (circa 1926-1963, shared or sequential with Joseph H. Frost; exact years unclear)
generation_3.note: Called 'T.C. Frost Sr.' in son Tom Jr.'s era. His exact presidential tenure is not clearly stated in accessible sources — TSHA focuses on founder generation, not this generation.
generation_3.confidence: CONFIRMED as T.C. Frost III; bank role PROBABLE based on succession narrative in Tom Jr. obituaries

generation_4.name: Tom Frost Jr. (Thomas Clayborne Frost IV)
generation_4.source: San Antonio Express-News obituary 2018 (via Wayback Machine); Find a Grave 192133735

open_questions.question: What is Shari Mattingly's mother's given name and maiden name?
open_questions.how_to_resolve: Texas Death Index (Ancestry.com, paywalled) — search for Mattingly deaths Bexar County 1960-2010. Or: Shari's birth certificate (Texas State Archives or Vital Statistics Unit, Austin) which would name both parents. Or: Shari's parents' marriage record in Texas Marriage Index (Ancestry, paywalled).

open_questions.question: Did T.C. Frost III and Ilse Herff have a daughter born ~1923-1927 in addition to Tom Jr. (1927) and Ilse Ita (1930)?
open_questions.how_to_resolve: Texas Birth Index 1920-1930, Bexar County (Ancestry, paywalled). Or: Frost family obituaries in San Antonio Express-News archive (searchable via NewsBank or ProQuest at a library).

open_questions.question: When did T.C. Frost III and Ilse Herff marry?
open_questions.how_to_resolve: Texas Marriage Index 1922-1926 for 'Frost' + 'Herff' (Ancestry, paywalled). Marriage announcement likely in San Antonio Express circa 1922-1924.

open_questions.question: Is there a Frost-Mattingly marriage record in Texas ~1944-1950?
open_questions.how_to_resolve: Texas Marriage Index 1940-1955 for 'Frost' + 'Mattingly' (Ancestry). Bexar County District Clerk marriage records (public record, searchable at courthouse or via mail request). San Antonio newspaper marriage announcements.

open_questions.question: Could Shari's mother be from a different Frost family line entirely (not T.C. Frost Bank family)?
open_questions.note: Frost is not an uncommon surname in Texas. Without a confirmed maiden name, the entire Frost Bank connection rests on Shari's oral family tradition. The bank-president detail is a strong anchor but oral traditions can misidentify specific relatives.

open_questions.question: What is the birth year discrepancy — if T.C. Frost III (born 1903) married Ilse Herff circa 1924-1926, a 1923 birth is impossible; actual birth year may be ~1926-1929.
open_questions.note: Family oral traditions often have 1-5 year birth year errors, especially for deceased elders. The 1923 figure should be treated as approximate.

research_blockers_encountered: FamilySearch.org — blocked by security service (error 15); no workaround found
Find a Grave — Cloudflare JS challenge on most direct fetches; worked around via Brave search snippets and Wayback Machine
Texas Marriage Index — paywalled at Ancestry
San Antonio Express-News (mysanantonio.com) — Cloudflare JS challenge; archived versions accessible via Wayback Machine
WikiTree API — rate limit 429 after 2 requests
Brave Search — captcha triggered after multiple queries
confidence_rationale: The Frost Bank presidential succession is CONFIRMED through primary sources (TSHA, SA Express-News obituaries). The identification of Tom Frost Jr. as the most likely 'uncle who was bank president' is PROBABLE. The critical link — that Shari's mother was a daughter of T.C. Frost III and Ilse Herff — is UNCONFIRMED. No accessible source names a daughter of T.C. Frost III born ~1923-1927, and no Frost-Mattingly marriage record was located. The research has reached the limit of freely accessible online primary sources.
